title: TC4 golem core/AI parity batch 1
completed: Restored original EnumGolemType constants for health, armor, speed, fireResist, upgrade slots, carry, regenDelay and strength.
Restored original itemGolemCore metadata order and capability flags hasGUI/canSort/hasInventory.
Added original EntityGolemBase NBT keys and migration bridge.
Adjusted golem attributes, carry limit and inventory slot calculations toward original EntityGolemBase formulas.
Marked pre-existing non-original bodyguard/patrol core names as migration adapters only.
forge_1_19_2_adapters: ThaumGolemEntity remains a PathfinderMob instead of the original EntityGolem inheritance chain.
Task execution remains adapted to 1.19.2 goals/ticks until the later full AI task-class pass.
Wireless backpack/decorations still use itemized Forge adapter representation.
